emails.subject: Possible upcoming project — early information
emails.body:
Good morning, We may have an upcoming project for community facility repairs and would like to know if your firm would be interested. Details are still being finalized and a formal notice may follow. No solicitation number has been assigned yet.

J. Rivera

emails.subject: Summer sale: 15% off excavator rentals this month
emails.body:
Hi there! Don't miss our summer rental promotion — 15% off all mid-size excavators and skid steers through the end of the month. Reply to schedule a demo.

EquipmentWorld Rentals

emails.subject: RFP PRDOH-2026-R-0142 — CDBG-DR Home Repair & Reconstruction, Region 4
emails.body:
Good afternoon,

The Puerto Rico Department of Housing has released solicitation PRDOH-2026-R-0142 for the CDBG-DR Home Repair and Reconstruction Program, Region 4 (Mayaguez). Proposal due date: August 24, 2026 at 3:00 PM AST. The RFP document is attached.

Procurement Office
Puerto Rico Department of Housing

requirements.text:

Pre-bid conference (virtual): August 3, 2026 at 10:00 AM AST
Deadline for written questions: August 10, 2026
Proposal due date: August 24, 2026 at 3:00 PM AST
Anticipated award: September 15, 2026
S
The Contractor shall provide a payment and performance bond equal to 100% of the contract value.
Offerors must demonstrate completion of at least five (5) CDBG-DR funded residential projects.
The Contractor is responsible for compliance with Davis-Bacon prevailing wage requirements.
All work shall comply with the PRDOH Footprint Excavation and Fill Scoping Estimating Guidelines.
The Contractor shall maintain commercial general liability insurance of not less than $2,000,000.
calendar day shall apply to late completion of each unit.

chunks.text:
REQUEST FOR PROPOSALS
Solicitation No. PRDOH-2026-R-0142
PUERTO RICO DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING
CDBG-DR Home Repair and Reconstruction Program - Region 4 (Mayaguez)
SECTION 1 - SUMMARY
The Puerto Rico Department of Housing (PRDOH) invites qualified general contractors to submit
proposals for residential repair and full reconstruction services across Region 4. Work includes
demolition, foundations, concrete and wood-frame reconstruction, roofing, electrical, plumbing,
and final inspections in accordance with program guidelines.
SECTION 2 - KEY DATES
Pre-bid conference (virtual): August 3, 2026 at 10:00 AM AST
Deadline for written questions: August 10, 2026
Proposal due date: August 24, 2026 at 3:00 PM AST
Anticipated award: September 15, 2026
SECTION 3 - REQUIREMENTS
The Contractor shall hold an active PR General Contractor license and DACO registration.
The Contractor shall provide a payment and performance bond equal to 100% of the contract value.
Offerors must demonstrate completion of at least five (5) CDBG-DR funded residential projects.
The Contractor is responsible for compliance with Davis-Bacon prevailing wage requirements.
All work shall comply with the PRDOH Footprint Excavation and Fill Scoping Estimating Guidelines.
The Contractor shall maintain commercial general liability insurance of not less than $2,000,000.
SECTION 4 - RISKS AND TERMS
Liquidated damages of $500 per

calendar day shall apply to late completion of each unit.
Retainage of 10% will be withheld until final acceptance.
The Owner may terminate for convenience with fifteen (15) days written notice.
SECTION 5 - EVALUATION
Proposals will be evaluated on price (40%), past performance (30%), technical approach (20%),
and small/local business participation (10%).
SECTION 6 - SCOPE OF WORK
The scope includes approximately 180 housing units: 120 repair scopes averaging $45,000 and
60 full reconstructions averaging $185,000, including engineered fill, cut and fill balancing,
utility reconnection, and ADA accessibility upgrades where applicable.

AMENDMENT NO. 1
Solicitation No. PRDOH-2026-R-0142
CDBG-DR Home Repair and Reconstruction Program - Region 4
This amendment revises the solicitation as follows:
1. The proposal due date is EXTENDED. Revised proposal due date: September 7, 2026 at 3:00 PM AST.
2. Answers to written questions received by August 10, 2026 are published as Attachment Q&A-1.
3. Section 3 is revised: the bonding requirement may be satisfied with a bid bond of 5% at
   submission, with payment and performance bonds due at award.
4. All other terms and conditions remain unchanged.
Offerors shall acknowledge receipt of this amendment in their proposal cover letter.
